ANY EXHIBIT MUST BE SEPARATED BY AN EXHIBIT TAB PER CRC 3.1110(F). THE COURT HAS COURTESY COPIES OF THE OPPOSITION AND REPLY PAPERS. JUDGE: MARLA J. MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT KIMBERLY SCHWEDE'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION IS Continued to Jan 3, 2014 per all parties' agreement. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Court Reporter: Tony Vaughn, CSR #6185

MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION
Off Calendar Dec-06-2013 Continued To Dec-20-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT KIMBERLY SCHWEDE'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION IS Continued to December 20, 2013 to give Defendant the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Defendant must deliver courtesy copies of the moving papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than December 6, 2013 at 12:00 pm or the motion will be denied. Any exhibit must be separated by an exhibit tab per CRC 3.1110(f). The court has courtesy copies of the opposition and reply papers. Judge: Marla J.
